top_signals.title: Pakistan Fuel Sales Slump as War Boosts Prices, Hits Demand
top_signals.summary: Fuel sales in Pakistan have slumped as costlier prices triggered by the Iran war force consumers to cut back, according to AKD Securities Ltd.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Over 116,000 Minecraft systems infected in WeedHack malware campaign
top_signals.summary: A large-scale malware campaign dubbed WeedHack is targeting Minecraft players and has infected more than 116,000 systems since January. [...]

top_signals.title: Partners Caps Redemptions on Evergreen Fund Amid Rising Requests
top_signals.summary: Partners Group CEO David Layton discusses the firm’s move to cap withdrawals at one of its evergreen private equity funds amid heightened redemption pressure. He speaks with Matt Miller on “Bloomberg Brief.” (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Index investing will evolve with mega IPOs
top_signals.summary: New offerings will be a test but markets ultimately absorb new supply and determine prices over time

top_signals.title: Staff burnout soars in professional services due to inefficiencies and outdated IT
top_signals.summary: More than a quarter of client-facing staff at professional services firms are wasting a large portion of their working week on manual administrative tasks rather than core client work, according to new research by Unit4. The report, commissioned by Pierre Audoin Consultants (PAC), on global mid-to-large professional services firms, including those in the UK, revealed [...]
